params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: since
params.description: Return threats detected after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

params.name: severity
params.description: Filter threats by severity level

items.docs: Retrieve a list of aggregated threats detected across managed endpoints. Threats are collections of related alerts grouped by Trellix correlation logic, including severity rankings, SHA256 hashes, and MITRE ATT&CK technique mappings.

params.name: threatId
params.description: Unique identifier of the threat

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information about a specific threat including all associated alerts, affected hosts, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, and aggregated indicators of compromise.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: since
params.description: Return detections that occurred after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

params.name: threatId
params.description: Filter detections associated with a specific threat

items.docs: Retrieve individual detection events across managed endpoints. Detections include SHA256 hashes, severity rankings, and MITRE ATT&CK technique tags associated with each event.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: since
params.description: Return alerts generated after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

params.name: severity
params.description: Filter alerts by severity level

items.docs: Retrieve discrete detection alerts containing process, user, and host context. Alerts include trace identifiers, detection dates, event types, severity scores, and detection tags.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: threatId
params.description: Filter affected hosts by a specific threat

items.docs: Retrieve detection counts, severity rankings, and first detection timestamps for systems affected by threats. Provides a host-centric view of the threat landscape across managed endpoints.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieve the list of real-time searches and their current execution status.

Initiate a real-time search across managed endpoints to hunt for specific indicators of compromise such as file hashes, process names, or network connections. The search runs asynchronously and results are retrieved separately.

params.name: searchId
params.description: Unique identifier of the real-time search

items.docs: Retrieve the current status and results of a real-time search. Results include matching endpoints and the specific indicators that were found during the search.
Execute a response reaction on a targeted endpoint, such as killing a process, quarantining a file, or collecting forensic data. Reactions are executed in the context of a real-time search session.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: since
params.description: Return actions executed after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

items.docs: Retrieve the history of response actions executed through the EDR platform, including their status and target details.
